name: Malformed CSV row
business_reaction: user loses trust in tool output
technical_change: validate headers and surface row number

name: Affects cell with stray spaces or empty ids
Components file missing or wrong path
Component id renamed but stressors not updated
Large architecture (hundreds of components)
Non-UTF8 or Excel-encoded export
Schema drift (new Stressor field added)
Two processes append to stressors.csv at once
detection: interleaved or truncated rows on next read
attractor: serialize writes behind a file lock
technical_change: write to temp file then atomic rename

name: Disk fills during a write
technical_change: check every write result before replacing

name: architecture dir on a read-only mount
No write permission on reports dir
technical_change: propagate error with a remedy line

name: architecture path is a symlink cycle
Windows CRLF endings from cross-platform edits
detection: trailing carriage return in last field
technical_change: strip carriage returns in the reader

name: UTF-8 BOM at start of file
detection: first header parses with a hidden prefix
technical_change: detect and skip a leading BOM

name: Final data row has no trailing newline
detection: last record dropped by strict readers
business_reaction: a stressor vanishes from the matrix

name: Same component id added twice
detection: two component rows share an id

name: Same stressor id appears twice
Components file has only a header
attractor: treat empty as a valid empty set
business_reaction: matrix is blank with no hint

name: Stressors file is empty
Spreadsheet save reorders the columns
detection: fields map to the wrong meaning
attractor: bind fields by header name not position
technical_change: parse by header rather than index

name: Editor adds an empty trailing column
business_reaction: rows fail to parse after edit

name: A name contains a comma so it gets quoted
detection: raw splitter breaks the quoted field
attractor: rely on a real CSV reader
technical_change: use the csv crate quoting rules

name: A cell holds a newline from Alt-Enter in Excel
detection: row appears split across two lines
business_reaction: one stressor becomes two broken rows

name: Emoji or CJK characters in a component name
detection: column widths misalign in the matrix
attractor: measure display width not byte length
technical_change: compute width with a grapheme aware helper

name: A component name is thousands of characters
detection: a single column overruns the terminal
attractor: truncate long names with an ellipsis

name: A component id is only spaces
detection: an invisible empty id slips through

name: affects uses Auth but the id is auth
detection: affects fails to match any component
attractor: decide on case sensitivity and enforce it
technical_change: normalize case or validate exact match

name: A component name contains a semicolon
detection: name reads like an affects delimiter
attractor: keep the delimiter scoped to affects only
technical_change: never split name fields on semicolons

name: A stressor id equals a component id
attractor: keep stressor and component id spaces separate

name: Init is run inside an existing architecture
detection: existing CSVs about to be clobbered
attractor: refuse to overwrite without a force flag
technical_change: check for existing files before writing

name: Matrix runs while stressor add is writing
detection: reader sees a partially written file
attractor: write atomically so readers see whole files

name: One stressor affects every component
attractor: handle dense rows without breaking layout
technical_change: paginate or write to file for wide rows

name: affects points at a deleted component
detection: a reference with no matching column
business_reaction: matrix hides a real coupling as zero

name: test is given a path that does not exist
attractor: clear file-not-found message with the path
business_reaction: user cannot run the empirical test

name: Test file has different columns than expected
detection: deserialize mismatch on the test input
attractor: validate the test file schema first

name: Terminal reports zero or unknown width
detection: division or layout assumes a real width
attractor: fall back to a sane default width

name: Stdout is piped so there is no TTY
detection: color escape codes leak into the file
attractor: detect a non-tty and disable styling

name: NO_COLOR is set in the environment
Locale formats decimals with a comma
detection: residual index parses or prints oddly
technical_change: format numbers with a fixed locale

name: architecture path has non-ascii characters
attractor: treat paths as opaque OS strings
business_reaction: tool fails for some users by name

name: Working directory path contains spaces
business_reaction: file not found on some machines

name: Tool is run from a nested subdirectory
detection: relative architecture path is not found
attractor: search upward for the architecture dir
business_reaction: user confused why files are missing

name: HOME is unset in a minimal environment
attractor: fall back to the current directory

name: User presses Ctrl-C during a write
attractor: write atomically so interrupts are safe

name: reports matrix is older than the stressors file
attractor: note or regenerate when inputs are newer
technical_change: compare mtimes and warn or rebuild

name: CSV contains git merge conflict markers
attractor: detect markers and stop with a hint

name: CSV is actually a git-lfs pointer stub
detection: tiny file with lfs pointer text
business_reaction: empty analysis with no clear cause

name: File was saved as UTF-16 by an editor
detection: bytes parse as garbage or fail
technical_change: detect UTF-16 BOM and reject or convert

name: User saved a TSV instead of a CSV
detection: every row parses as one big field
business_reaction: whole file looks like one column
technical_change: sniff the delimiter or document CSV only

name: Excel in the EU writes semicolon separated rows
detection: each row collapses into one field
technical_change: detect the separator and guide the user

name: Spreadsheet strips leading zeros from an id
attractor: treat ids as text not numbers
business_reaction: affects no longer match the column

name: An id like 1e5 is reinterpreted as a number
Excel turns an id like 3-12 into a date
attractor: keep id cells as plain text

name: Project path exceeds the OS path limit
attractor: fail clearly with the offending path

name: macOS treats Components.csv as components.csv
attractor: pick a canonical filename and stick to it

name: Excel holds the file open with a lock
detection: write fails on Windows with a sharing error
attractor: retry or report the locked file
business_reaction: user cannot save while it is open

name: Antivirus locks or removes the written report
detection: report missing or access denied after write
attractor: retry and report a likely scanner

name: architecture dir lives on a slow network mount
attractor: keep IO minimal and fail with a timeout hint
technical_change: avoid repeated reads of the same file

name: A signal interrupts a read syscall
detection: read returns fewer bytes than asked

name: A million-row stressors file is loaded
detection: memory use spikes on a full read
attractor: stream rows instead of loading all

name: A sum count exceeds the column width
attractor: size columns to the widest value
technical_change: measure the widest count before printing

name: An affects cell lists the same id twice
An affects cell ends with a semicolon
detection: a trailing empty id is produced

name: An affects cell starts with a semicolon
detection: a leading empty id is produced

name: User separates affects with commas not semicolons
detection: whole list parsed as one id
technical_change: validate and hint on the delimiter

name: User adds a hash comment line to a CSV
detection: a comment row fails to deserialize
attractor: decide whether to skip comment lines
technical_change: skip or reject comment lines clearly

name: Empty lines sit between data rows
File is named stressors.txt not csv
attractor: match by known filenames not guesses
business_reaction: user runs against the wrong file

name: components.csv exists as a directory
attractor: check the path is a file

name: A consumer like head closes stdout early
detection: write fails with a broken pipe
business_reaction: tool panics when output is piped
technical_change: treat broken pipe as a clean exit

name: Window is resized during a long render
Tool runs in CI with no interactive TTY
Two init runs race to create the directory
detection: both try to create the same files

name: A component name begins with a dash
detection: clap parses the name as a flag
technical_change: allow values after the argument terminator

name: An unquoted name contains a star
detection: the shell expands it before clap sees it

name: Architecture grows to hundreds of columns
detection: matrix far wider than any screen
attractor: write to a file and summarize on screen

name: Stressors reference ids before any component exists
technical_change: validate against an empty component set

name: The header row has two name columns
business_reaction: wrong column read into a field

name: A data row omits the id field
detection: deserialize fails on a missing field
technical_change: validate required fields with row number

name: Header names carry leading or trailing spaces
business_reaction: files fail to parse after editing

name: The file contains embedded NUL bytes
business_reaction: a binary file looks like an empty load

name: File is cut mid UTF-8 sequence
technical_change: report the byte offset of bad UTF-8

name: reports dir does not exist on first matrix run
detection: write fails because the dir is missing
attractor: create the reports dir on demand

name: User hand-edited reports matrix then reran
attractor: treat the report as generated output
technical_change: document that the report is regenerated

name: Old CSV opened by a newer binary
technical_change: use additive fields with serde defaults

name: A panic occurs while writing a record
detection: an unwound write leaves a partial file
attractor: write to temp and rename on success
technical_change: never write in place on the original

name: Composed and decomposed accents differ in ids
detection: visually equal ids do not match

name: An affects line exceeds the reader buffer
detection: record reader hits a length limit
attractor: raise or remove fixed buffer limits
business_reaction: very coupled stressors fail to load

name: A component add is given an empty name
A path argument uses a tilde for home
detection: the literal tilde dir is used
business_reaction: files written to a tilde folder

name: An id carries trailing spaces in the file
detection: the id fails to match elsewhere

name: Header is Id or NAME instead of expected case
business_reaction: files fail after a spreadsheet save
